utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 items are present. Each is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is clear; travel_dates (September 25–29, 2024) are specific; transportation includes flight details and cost (€120); accommodation includes hotel name, cost per night, and total (€90 per night, €450 total); activities are listed with specific costs; additional_services lists meals with cost (€150); total_budget (€860) is provided. Therefore, all items are included and fully detailed.

The accommodation is 'Eco Lodge (sustainable, nature-focused)', directly matching 'Eco Lodge' with a rating of 10. The activities include 'Sintra-Cascais Natural Park Hiking Expedition', which aligns with 'Hiking Expedition' (rating 10); 'Coastal Yoga Retreat' aligns with 'Yoga Retreat' (rating 10); 'Street Art Tour' aligns directly with 'Street Art Tour' (rating 9); and 'Night Photography Tour' corresponds to the night activity of the same name (rating 10).
